title: PH PandaHall 9m Christmas Stripes Cotton Ribbon,10mm Red White Ribbons Farmhouse Cotton Webbing Sewing Fabric Trim Roll for Gift Wrapping Home Decor DIY Crafts Bouquet
features: Classic Striped Design: Design by the classic striped, brings a sense of simplicity and elegance. The cotton ribbon roll can meet your daily needs for decoration. Use it to accentuate handmade crafts, or enhance the cozy feel of your home decor

Quality Material: Made from natural cotton fabric, durable and not easy to fade or damage, with soft touching, with classic stripes edge across 2 sides of crafting ribbon. It is easy for you to decorate your gifts or add to your crafts project

Package Includes: You will receive 1 roll red cotton stripe ribbon. Size: about 10 yards/ 9m long, 3/8 inch(10mm) wide. Length enough to meet your daily needs. You can cut the length according to your needs and wrap it in a roll for convenient storage

Perfect for DIY: This striped ribbon roll is great for DIY crafts, such as bows, wedding invitations, and wreaths. It can be easily fixed and shaped to decorate for any occasion. You can cut, sew, or paste ribbons for various home decor or clothing designs

Wide Application: With its versatile design, this striped ribbon is perfect for all kinds of occasions, such as Christmas, weddings, Thanksgiving, Mother's Day, party decorations, etc. It can be used for gifts, Christmas trees, wedding bouquets, etc.
